texto: How can our words ever truly be our own? Since we started growing all we've been taught is to care how we represent our persona and how we should communicate appropriately and how we portrait ourselves as acceptable human beings. what we've been taught, thats everything. We didn't shape our own minds, so how can our words really be our own?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de A.Y.C.C que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “How can our words ever truly be our own? Since we started growing all we've been taught is to car…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, society, thoughts, com foco em thoughts e sabedoria.
